articles.author: Hartley Charlton
articles.title: EU Drops Battery Removal Requirement for Apple Watch and AirPods - MacRumors
articles.description: The European Commission yesterday adopted new exemptions to its Batteries Regulation that free the Apple Watch and AirPods from having to offer...
articles.content:
The European Commission yesterday adopted new exemptions to its Batteries Regulation that free the Apple Watch and AirPods from having to offer user-removable and replaceable batteries.
The EU's Bat… [+2188 chars]
